backend.auth: Supabase Auth Native SDK Edge Validation (getUser)
backend.ai_llm: Gemini 2.5 Flash via OpenAI-compatible API (openai npm package)

ai_provider_details.strategy: OpenAI SDK cho LLM chat, Google SDK cho embedding — cùng 1 API key

backend.security: Helmet, CORS, timingSafeEqual (webhook HMAC), AES-256-GCM (token encryption), HMAC-SHA256 (OAuth state), @nestjs/throttler (rate limiting)
backend.payment: SePay VietQR webhook (bank transfer detection), @nestjs/schedule (cron jobs)

frontend.frontend: Next.js 16 (App Router), React 19, Tailwind CSS v4, Zustand, Supabase SSR
frontend.theme: next-themes (class-based dark mode, system preference support)

key_models: Agent (AI bot - has isDefault, isActive flags)
ChannelConnection (FB/Zalo - has agentId FK to Agent)

key_relations.Agent_Channel: 1:N - One bot serves many channels, one channel has one bot (agentId on ChannelConnection, onDelete: SetNull)
key_relations.Agent_Knowledge: N:M via AgentKnowledge junction table (onDelete: Cascade both sides)
key_relations.Tenant_Agent: 1:N - Tenant owns agents, auto-creates default bot
key_relations.Tenant_Knowledge: 1:N - Knowledge belongs to tenant, not bot

channel_connection_fields.refreshTokenEnc: String? — Zalo refresh token, encrypted same as accessTokenEnc
channel_connection_fields.tokenExpiresAt: DateTime? — null for FB (non-expiring), set for Zalo (1h access token)

global_overview.notes: Plan model includes maxTenants (Int, default 1) — per-plan tenant limits: Free=1, Basic=2, Standard=5, Premium=10

frontend_perspective.tenant: Cửa hàng độc lập thuộc về seller
frontend_perspective.agent: Bot AI cấu hình per-tenant: name, persona, greeting (model/temperature/maxTokens do platform quản lý, ẩn khỏi user)

api_endpoints.description: Staff sends message directly (no LLM), auto-switches status to OPEN, sends to FB/Zalo
Hand conversation back to bot (OPEN → BOT_HANDLING), SYSTEM audit message
Disconnect Facebook Page (unsubscribe webhook + clear tokens)
Get pending pages for multi-page selection
Select a Facebook Page from pending session
SePay bank transfer webhook (excluded from /api/v1 prefix)

bot_channel_binding.description: Full bot-channel-knowledge binding with 15 business rules

billing_management.description: Plan CRUD, subscription, usage tracking, SePay payment

chat_crm.description: Real-time chat with WebSocket, human takeover, bot handover

knowledge_rag.description: Document upload, chunking, vector search, agent-scoped RAG

channel_integration.description: Facebook Messenger + Zalo OA OAuth, webhook handling

dashboard_analytics.description: Dashboard charts: daily conversations (Area), customer growth (Bar), channel distribution (Pie), bot performance (Horizontal Bar). BE stats API with Prisma groupBy. FE uses Recharts 3.8.
components: FE: Redesigned stat cards (Bot AI, Kênh, Tài liệu, Khách hàng)

landing_page.description: High-performance landing page with interactive chat mockup, snappy dark mode, and responsive layout

phase_09_facebook_messenger.notes: Refactored to OAuth flow (no manual token). Multi-page selection, token encryption, webhook unsubscribe on disconnect, rate limiting.

zalo_oa_channel.notes: Full Zalo OA integration: OAuth, token refresh (1h TTL), webhook (HMAC), message routing, ZaloAdapter for send/reply.

facebook_oauth_refactor.notes: Replaced manual token input with OAuth flow. HMAC-signed state, multi-page selection, encrypted token storage.

security_enhancements.notes: AES-256-GCM token encryption (crypto.util.ts), HMAC-SHA256 OAuth state, rate limiting (@Throttle 5/min on OAuth endpoints), token revocation on disconnect.

billing_plans_system.notes: 4-tier plans (Free/Basic/Standard/Premium), QuotaService (auto-assign, limit checks, monthly reset cron), branding injection (Free watermark), downgrade LIFO deactivation, expiry cron (6h), REST APIs, FE Usage+Billing UI.

payment_integration.notes: VietQR+SePay: PaymentOrder model, webhook auto-detect, QR code modal, polling, subscription activate, response pack purchase, transaction history, expiry reminder (cron 6h), WebSocket notifications, FE ExpiryWarningBanner.

tenant_quota_enforcement.notes: maxTenants field in Plan model, checkTenantLimit() in QuotaService, tenants usage in getUsageStats(), TenantSwitcher dropdown with quota display + inline create + upgrade CTA.

frontend_sprints: Knowledge Upload UI — Drag & Drop, Document Table, Status Badges (Hoàn thành - Sprint 4)
Playground — Chat UI test Bot AI với RAG pipeline thực tế (Hoàn thành - Sprint 4)
Live Chat CRM UI — layout + data binding + human reply (Sprint 5)
Handover to Bot — button in CustomerPanel (Sprint 5)
Channel Management — Facebook OAuth + Zalo OA OAuth, setup guide, webhook URL copy (Sprint 6)
Facebook Multi-page Selection — interactive card UI for choosing FB Page when user manages multiple pages (Sprint 6)
Zalo OA Channel Section — OAuth connect/disconnect, status display (Sprint 6)
Real-time CRM — Socket.IO WebSocket, useSocket hook, reconnect resync, dedup (Sprint 5)
🎉 BE Module Complete — All 11 phases done
Deployment Guide — Render (BE) + Vercel (FE) free tier (Sprint 5)
Billing Usage UI — Usage page (progress bars), Billing page (plan comparison), QuotaWarningBanner, UpgradeModal (Sprint 7)

landing_features.name: Interactive Chat Mockup
landing_features.description: Automated typing and cycling chat scenarios to demonstrate AI capabilities.

landing_features.name: Snappy Dark Mode
landing_features.description: Instant theme switching using transition suppression hack and localStorage persistence.

landing_features.name: Feature Grid
landing_features.description: Uniform height cards using CSS grid auto-rows-fr.

business_rules: 1 channel = 1 bot only
1 bot = N channels
Each tenant has 1 undeletable default bot
Delete bot → channels unlinked (agentId=null), knowledge preserved
New channel → no auto-assign bot
Reassign bot → confirm dialog
Bot inactive + channel → no auto-reply
Knowledge belongs to tenant, not bot (N:M via AgentKnowledge)
Default bot counts toward quota
Mỗi Tenant có Slug đơn nhất. FE tự convert name → slug khi gọi API.
FE dùng Zustand selectors (không destructure) để layout re-render ổn định với SSR.
Route Dashboard bảo vệ bằng middleware.ts gọi createServerClient.
fetchTenants() phải được gọi ở dashboard/layout.tsx (không chỉ ở page con).
AgentFormModal dùng key-based remount pattern thay vì useEffect+setState.
ThemeProvider bọc ở root layout với suppressHydrationWarning trên <html>.
Tailwind CSS v4 dark mode: @custom-variant dark.
Platform controls AI model — user chỉ cấu hình name/persona/greeting.
Knowledge upload: max 10MB, .txt/.pdf only, multipart/form-data qua axios.
Zustand store dùng loadedForTenantId pattern để gate loading.
CRM /dashboard/chat route dùng full-height layout (overflow-hidden).
Handover to Bot: chỉ hiện nút khi status OPEN/SNOOZED, optimistic update store.
WebSocket dedup: cả optimistic update và WS handler đều check message.id.
Channel page: parse URL query params (?facebook=connected, ?zalo=connected, ?facebook=select_page&session_id=xxx)
Facebook multi-page: pendingSessionId prop → component loads pages → user selects → onRefresh clears session to prevent remount bug
Channel disconnect: confirm dialog before disconnecting, toast notification on success
Billing: Plan interface fields must match Prisma schema exactly (price not priceMonthly, hasBrandingWatermark not hasBranding)
Billing: QuotaWarningBanner shows at >80% AI responses (amber), 100% (red), dismissable 24h via localStorage
Billing: UsageProgressBar handles limit=-1 (unlimited) and limit=0 edge cases
Billing: UpgradeModal is MVP — Zalo + Email contact only, no payment integration yet
Tao Tenant -> auto-create OWNER TenantMember + default Agent (transaction)
Slug unique, lowercase+numbers+hyphens only
RBAC: OWNER > ADMIN > AGENT
TenantGuard checks isActive on TenantMember
Chat: auto-create Customer if customerId not provided
Chat: history context uses LAST 20 messages
Chat: HUMAN_AGENT messages map to 'assistant' role for LLM context
Quota: check messageUsed < messageQuota before LLM call, increment after success
Knowledge: max 10MB, .txt/.pdf only, recursive split 1500 chars/200 overlap
RAG: soft-lock prompt — prioritize knowledge but allow general answers
RAG: similarity threshold 0.3, top-K=5, graceful fallback on search failure
Conversation status OPEN = nhân viên đang xử lý, bot không reply
Human agent reply → auto status OPEN + forward to Facebook/Zalo
Handover-to-bot → status BOT_HANDLING + SYSTEM audit message
FB webhook: respond 200 trong 5s, xử lý async
Zalo webhook: HMAC-SHA256 verify (OA Secret Key), respond 200 async
Message dedup: in-memory Map (TTL 5 phút) — cần Redis khi multi-instance
Webhook HMAC: timingSafeEqual (anti timing attack)
FB Graph API: Bearer auth header (không dùng query param)
FB OAuth: HMAC-signed state (tenantId.timestamp.sig16), TTL 10 phút
FB Multi-page: 1 page → auto-connect, N pages → pending session (in-memory, TTL 10 phút) → FE chọn
Token encryption: AES-256-GCM, backward-compatible (plaintext nếu KEY chưa set)
Token revocation: FB disconnect → DELETE /{pageId}/subscribed_apps (non-blocking) + clear tokens
Zalo token refresh: access_token 1h TTL, auto-refresh 5 phút trước khi hết, background job mỗi 15 phút
Rate limiting: OAuth endpoints 5/min, global 10/min + 100/hour
Billing: 4 plans seeded via prisma/seed-plans.ts (idempotent upsert by slug)
Billing: SellerSubscription 1:1 per seller (sellerId @unique) — UPDATE not CREATE on plan change
Billing: Auto-assign Free plan on first getSubscription() for new sellers
Billing: QuotaService enforces AI response limits (check before LLM, increment after success)
Billing: Monthly reset cron (1st of month 00:00) resets aiResponsesUsed to 0
Billing: Branding watermark appended for Free plan via injectBranding() (excluded from testMessage/Playground)
Billing: Downgrade uses LIFO — newest resources deactivated first, OWNER never deactivated
Billing: Knowledge over-limit is soft (log warning only, no deactivation)
Billing: ExpiryCheck cron (every 6h) — expired ACTIVE subscriptions reverted to Free plan
Payment: Only 1 PENDING order per seller at any time (ensureNoPendingOrder)
Payment: orderCode = 6 random digits, transferContent = PREFIX + orderCode
Payment: SePay webhook auth = 'Apikey {key}' header, timing-safe comparison
Payment: Webhook DTO uses @Allow() decorators (bypass Global ValidationPipe whitelist)
Payment: completeOrder() dedup by sepayTransId (Prisma @unique)
Payment: Response Pack purchase → bonusResponsesRemaining += packSize (atomic increment)
Payment: reminderSentAt reset to null on both plan downgrade and subscription renewal
Notification: WebSocket rooms = auth:{supabaseUserId}, Supabase JWT handshake verification
Tenant limit: Plan.maxTenants enforced by QuotaService.checkTenantLimit() before tenant creation
Tenant limit: Usage API includes tenants.used/tenants.limit for FE quota display
Tenant limit: TenantModule imports PlanModule for QuotaService DI
Bot responses are counted for pricing, staff messages are not.
Free trial requires no credit card.
coding_conventions: language: Vietnamese comments for business logic, English for technical
api_pattern: NestJS Controller → Service → Prisma
frontend_pattern: Zustand stores + service layer + page components
error_handling: Axios error typed as { response?: { data?: { message?: string } } }
auth: Supabase Bearer token → SupabaseAuthGuard → request.user = { authId, email, sellerId }
Import paths use .js extension (ESM compat)
Controller user type: inline { sellerId: string }
Services receive sellerId as first param
Nested resources: /tenants/:tenantId/agents
DTOs use class-validator decorators + @nestjs/swagger ApiProperty
PrismaService is @Global() via CommonModule
LlmService is @Global() via CommonModule > LlmModule
LLM calls must be wrapped in try/catch with Logger
pgvector operations use $queryRawUnsafe with parameterized queries
Fire-and-forget pattern for sendHumanReplyToChannel (.catch log, no await block)
WS events: EventEmitter2 decoupled (Service emits → Gateway broadcasts to Socket.IO rooms)
WS room naming: tenant:{tenantId} (conversations) + auth:{authId} (billing notifications)
API prefix: /api/v1 globally, exclude webhook/* and channels/*/callback
Response format: ResponseInterceptor wraps { success: true, data } globally
Error format: GlobalExceptionFilter → { success: false, error: { statusCode, message, timestamp, path } }
Token encrypt/decrypt: encryptToken()/decryptToken() from src/common/crypto.util.ts — all token read/write must use these
OAuth state: createSignedState()/verifySignedState() from src/common/crypto.util.ts
Pending page sessions: in-memory Map with 10min TTL + 60s cleanup interval
Graceful shutdown: app.enableShutdownHooks() in main.ts
Dockerfile: non-root user (appuser), healthcheck, multi-stage build
useEffect+setState bị cấm — thay bằng key remount hoặc useSyncExternalStore.
Zustand store: dùng selector riêng lẻ (không destructure).
Service layer pattern: src/lib/services/[feature].service.ts.
Store layer pattern: src/store/[feature]-store.ts.
Component folder pattern: src/components/[feature]/[component].tsx.
CRM types: chat.service.ts là source of truth, types.ts re-export + UI helpers.
Store silent refresh: force=true giữ data cũ visible.
Store optimistic update: updateConversationLocally() thay vì force-fetch.
Socket hook pattern: src/hooks/useSocket.ts — returns { status, socket, reconnectCount }.
WS event handlers: payload typed as unknown + try-catch boundary + early return on invalid.
Stale closure prevention: useRef cho selectedConvId trong socket callbacks.
Axios auto-unwrap: response interceptor unwrap { success, data } → service layer vẫn dùng response.data.
Axios baseURL: /api/v1 prefix — webhook URL dùng raw base (không qua axios).
Channel section components: separate files per channel (FacebookChannelSection.tsx, ZaloChannelSection.tsx).
OAuth callback handling: page.tsx parses URL params → passes state to channel sections → sections manage own UI state.
Billing components: src/components/billing/*.tsx (UsageProgressBar, PlanComparisonTable, UpgradeModal, QuotaWarningBanner).
Billing pages: /dashboard/usage (progress cards + cycle info), /dashboard/billing (plan hero + comparison table).
Dark Mode uses .dark class on <html> root
Theme toggle uses disable-transitions class to prevent lag
Standardized surface color tokens (50-950) in global.css
